mapper.sql: select id, type, title, content, data, scope, user_id, user_type, notice_type, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from sys_notification
mapper.insert:
insert into sys_notification
type, title, content, data, scope, user_id, user_type, notice_type, status, create_by, create_time, remark,
#{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{data}, #{scope}, #{userId}, #{userType}, #{noticeType}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark},
mapper.delete:
delete from sys_notification where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select n.id, n.type, n.title, n.content, n.data, n.scope, n.user_id, n.user_type, n.notice_type, n.status, n.create_by, n.create_time, n.update_by, n.update_time, n.remark, 0 as is_read from sys_notification n where n.status = '0' and ( (n.scope = 'user' and n.user_id = #{userId} and n.user_type = #{userType}) or n.scope = 'all' ) and not exists ( select 1 from sys_notification_read r where r.notification_id = n.id and r.user_id = #{userId} and r.user_type = #{userType} ) order by n.create_time desc

select n.id, n.type, n.title, n.content, n.data, n.scope, n.user_id, n.user_type, n.notice_type, n.status, n.create_by, n.create_time, n.update_by, n.update_time, n.remark, case when r.id is not null then 1 else 0 end as is_read from sys_notification n left join sys_notification_read r on r.notification_id = n.id and r.user_id = #{userId} and r.user_type = #{userType} where n.status = '0' and ( (n.scope = 'user' and n.user_id = #{userId} and n.user_type = #{userType}) or n.scope = 'all' ) order by n.create_time desc
